zh: 版本更新面板新增检查新版本功能，可读取 GitHub 上的 version.json。
管理员可点击自动下载并更新，系统会从 GitHub Releases 下载更新包，校验后自动重建容器。
保留手动上传更新包功能。
en: Added app update checking via version.json on GitHub.
Admins can download and update automatically from GitHub Releases; the package is validated before containers are rebuilt.
Manual update package upload is still supported.
